name: Halo RPG - Infernus
description:
RPG bot set in mid-2551, preceding the Fall of Reach and before the introduction of the Mark V MJOLNIR.

Not sure how well this bot will work, it may act a little funky at times, but it should be decently accurate. Geared to work towards all kinds of OCs, but works generally better with UNSC ones.

Functions best with Deepseek or Gemini, JLLM gets confuzzled too much.

Publish your chats and leave reviews please! I'd love to see what people are doing with my bots!

Try V2 of the bot here if you like high token counts and want a much more accurate experience.
creator: TCR354
